    0.0465470068f, -0.0272260103f, 0.0320231728f, -0.0934093893f, -0.051110521f, 0.00186698092f, 0.0830731839f, -0.0951341242f,
    0.114390254f, -0.104718626f, -0.0155559499f, 0.0674637556f, 0.0495184958f, 0.0827795863f, -0.0284481309f, 0.0321821645f,
    0.0124569051f, 0.021393463f, 0.00335089187f, -0.0280546565f, 0.00401619356f, -0.106120162f, 0.0139368493f, 0.00183027552f,
    0.00759574398f, 0.0338270292f, 0.0499039441f, -0.0179374255f, -0.073110044f, -0.0712645724f, -0.0315879285f, -0.0242873281f,
    -0.00147634512f, -0.0650564805f, -0.121995851f, -0.0262398124f, 0.085677743f, -0.327548146f, 0.143917084f, 0.0203561299f,
    0.0283995364f, -0.0345894508f, 0.00804310385f, -0.0876123905f, 0.228443757f, -0.249519989f, -0.00682693161f, 0.0798334181f,
    -0.0294761974f, 0.02966596f, -0.0878279731f, -0.012016586f, 0.000710521941f, 0.0351791121f, -0.149914876f, -0.0865468755f,
    0.00648793764f, -0.048837278f, -0.117771849f, -0.0380899794f, 0.0474503338f, -0.00263570738f, 0.0481759384f, -0.000800598005f,
    0.0644245595f, 0.00143846101f, 0.0473968908f, 0.00636140164f, -0.00928014237f, -0.17467472f, 0.0586303622f, 0.0872032791f,
    -0.0563624501f, 0.00803581718f, -0.0364282466f, 0.0266658105f, 0.0145867784f, 0.0794472322f, -0.0485962518f, 0.0345115289f,
    0.0259604137f, 0.00629719533f, -0.0495949797f, 0.000639514008f, 0.0536070466f, -0.0227079466f, 0.0220809728f, -0.00877230149f,
    -0.0149165243f, -0.0306351818f, 0.0816602781f, 0.0393111333f, 0.063787654f, -0.086552687f, -0.0129342852f, 0.000106675063f,
    0.107070923f, 0.0768734813f, 0.0369246006f, -0.0075796172f, 0.102473669f, 0.0527938791f, -0.0416703299f, 0.0595059469f,
    -0.0169419311f, 0.0908675566f, 0.0295758843f, -0.000978776603f, 0.0429987386f, 0.0659838915f, -0.0107050668f, -0.00181462418f,
    0.0161013324f, 0.0550334454f, 0.0648090988f, 0.0103233196f, -0.0338937789f, 0.0542387515f, 0.0291318316f, 0.0756944269f,
    0.0106532583f, 0.015608876f, 0.102330029f, 0.0800623894f, -0.0336952358f, 0.0687800646f, 0.0926192179f, 0.0677965209f,
};
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float LAM_BLK6_B[32] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float LAM_BLK6_B[32] =
#endif
{
    0.0120761683f, 0.0229390003f, 0.0833738297f, -0.00733311567f, -0.0103326915f, -0.0511126369f, 0.120752715f, 0.155243188f,
    0.0656179711f, 0.0129782278f, -0.0543582737f, 0.0861135423f, 0.0f, -0.00308227772f, 0.0784541443f, -0.0105385166f,
    0.121322237f, 0.0774296969f, 0.165117621f, 0.0114312572f, -0.04697093f, 0.0759663507f, 0.137977108f, -0.0567048937f,
    -0.0399091132f, -0.0589588173f, 0.134293795f, -0.00187856006f, -0.0290316381f, -0.057452172f, 0.0199242271f, 0.133266702f,

#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__

#else

{
    0.00615172181f, 0.00175637682f, 0.0059143058f, 0.00734154927f, -0.00549444091f, 0.00101117918f, -0.0034321656f, -0.0039512259f,
    0.00424435455f, 0.00743378839f, -0.0042187483f, -0.00642285123f, -0.00383729418f, -0.0024350672f, -0.00226280768f, 0.00688071176f,
    0.00467098225f, 0.00152751803f, -0.00831048284f, 0.00317733851f, 0.00435372069f, 0.00524148904f, -0.00535020977f, -0.00284389174f,
    0.000896139711f, -0.00319367577f, 0.00175254617f, -0.00500226673f, -0.0025704368f, 0.00134876114f, -0.00529014831f, 0.00523879007f,
    0.108796708f, 0.00567637803f, -0.023955645f, -0.0800855607f, 0.0144344671f, -0.0226513036f, -0.0391465053f, -0.0170004237f,
    -0.0786755234f, 0.0451233461f, -0.0160262045f, -0.037525475f, -0.0687020123f, 0.00253246562f, -0.0281497054f, -0.07836923f,
    -0.0236737896f, -0.0289999489f, -0.0156769212f, 0.105708525f, 0.167319208f, -0.07744845f, 0.0484685712f, 0.0547566861f,
    -0.0983234346f, 0.0143832983f, 0.0745333135f, 0.0707873255f, 0.0141638387f, -0.101254374f, 0.0388523377f, 0.0306765512f,
    0.0240119807f, -0.123140872f, -0.0898974091f, 0.0769728348f, 0.116811268f, 0.0592439361f, -0.0604839101f, -0.0527409576f,
    0.113862619f, 0.0448595732f, 0.0480371378f, 0.0720089152f, 0.0187807512f, -0.0290320572f, 0.00695377216f, 0.0497218631f,
    -0.0282209739f, -0.0745422542f, 0.0481043421f, 0.126085624f, -0.00737770181f, 0.0593707934f, -0.0788288563f, -0.0278446712f,

    -0.0456512161f, -0.0402005091f, -0.0682979152f, -0.0256922916f, -0.0389721915f, -0.0144777615f, -0.0522688888f, -0.0670545697f,
    -0.0370468646f, -0.0433692373f, -0.0548585393f, -0.039514672f, -0.0479257256f, -0.0386550538f, -0.0540040508f, -0.0237744208f,
    -0.0494147465f, -0.0555938482f, -0.0548427738f, -0.0179731511f, -0.0345618613f, -0.0460905507f, -0.0499735884f, -0.0375676155f,
    -0.0186858773f, -0.0149946697f, -0.050819587f, -0.061240036f, -0.0316242091f, -0.0214753971f, -0.0421831273f, -0.0662522763f,
};

template<bool ReLU>
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void AddBlockWidth(const float* __restrict__ xin, float* __restrict__ xout, const float* __restrict__ W, const float* __restrict__ B) 
{
    float tmp[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(xin, tmp, 0, 0, W, B);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < WIDTH; ++i) 
    {
        xout[i] = xin[i] + tmp[i];
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void RGBEncode(const float* __restrict__ in3, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float scale = fmaxf(fmaxf(in3[0], in3[1]), in3[2]);
    const float scaleEps = scale + 0.001f;
    const float scaleEpsInv = 1.0f / scaleEps;
    constexpr int RGB_SIN_WIDTH = WIDTH / 4 / 2 * 2;
    float s[RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 4];
    // sincos: s = [sin(piR), cos(piR), sin(2piR), cos(2piR), ..., sin(piG), cos(piG), sin(2piG), cos(2piG), ..., sin(piB), cos(piB), sin(2piB), cos(2piB)]
    {
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[0] * scaleEpsInv * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2]);
        }
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[1] * scaleEpsInv * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2 + RGB_SIN_WIDTH]);
        }
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = in3[2] * scaleEpsInv * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 2], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2 + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 2]);
        }
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = scale * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 3], &s[k + RGB_SIN_WIDTH/2 + RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 3]);
        }
    }
    float h[WIDTH];
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<RGB_SIN_WIDTH * 4, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*ReLU=*/true, /*Opt=*/true>(s, h, 0, 0, RGB_IN_W, RGB_IN_B);
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK0_W, RGB_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK1_W, RGB_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK2_W, RGB_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK3_W, RGB_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK4_W, RGB_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK5_W, RGB_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, RGB_BLK6_W, RGB_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, RGB_OUT_W, nullptr);
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i)
    {
        outK[i] *= scale;
    }
}

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void LambdaEncode(const float* __restrict__ in1, float* __restrict__ outK) 
{
    const float x = fminf(fmaxf((in1[0] - 360.0f) / (780.0f - 360.0f), 0.0f), 1.0f);

    float h[WIDTH];
    // sincos: h = [sin(piR), cos(piR), sin(2piR), cos(2piR), ..., sin(piG), cos(piG), sin(2piG), cos(2piG), ..., sin(piB), cos(piB), sin(2piB), cos(2piB)]
    {
        //constexpr float TWO_PI = 6.28318530717958647692f;
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int k = 0; k < WIDTH/2; ++k)
        {
            const float phase = x * CUDART_PI_F * static_cast<float>(k + 1);
            sincosf(phase, &h[k], &h[k + WIDTH/2]);
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK0_W, LAM_BLK0_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK1_W, LAM_BLK1_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK2_W, LAM_BLK2_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK3_W, LAM_BLK3_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK4_W, LAM_BLK4_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK5_W, LAM_BLK5_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    {
        float t[WIDTH];
        tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, WIDTH, /*bBias=*/true, /*bReLU=*/true, /*bOpt=*/true>(h, t, 0, 0, LAM_BLK6_W, LAM_BLK6_B); 
        CUDA_UNROLL
        for (int ii=0; ii<WIDTH; ++ii)
        {
            h[ii] = h[ii] + t[ii];
        }
    }
    tensor::LinearRowMajor<WIDTH, KERNEL, /*bBias=*/false, /*bReLU=*/false, /*Opt=*/true>(h, outK, 0, 0, LAM_OUT_W, nullptr);
}
    
FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE float SpectralInteract(const float* __restrict__ RGBKernel, const float* __restrict__ LambdaKernel) 
{
    float acc = 0.0f;
    CUDA_UNROLL
    for (int i = 0; i < KERNEL; ++i) 
    {
        acc = fmaf(RGBKernel[i], LambdaKernel[i], acc);
    }
    return fminf(fmaxf(acc, 0.0f), 1.0f);
}
#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float inputTest[4][100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float inputTest[4][100] =
#endif

#ifdef __CUDA_ARCH__
alignas(16) static __device__ constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#else
alignas(16) inline constexpr float gtTest[100] =
#endif
{
    0.990496874f, 0.815875769f, 0.693656325f, 0.419869304f, 0.642334163f, 0.447370291f, 0.472272158f, 0.9640522f, 0.0783445835f, 0.0702060461f, 0.140128851f, 0.421847343f, 0.117789626f, 0.289573908f, 0.853572011f, 0.898289263f, 0.291914463f, 0.274155796f, 0.488068461f, 0.836775839f, 0.364238143f, 0.797109067f, 0.565988302f, 0.315455139f, 0.385122657f, 0.381345749f, 0.365709901f, 0.232221782f, 0.626219094f, 0.756753564f, 0.902158976f, 0.62383002f, 0.640396774f, 0.116563082f, 0.688987076f, 0.431292176f, 0.569157481f, 0.965170681f, 0.722702086f, 0.148693204f, 0.283552766f, 0.537148476f, 0.57039088f, 0.695008874f, 0.188685596f, 0.15125984f, 0.359292984f, 0.580328405f, 0.897464573f, 0.404363811f, 0.131284297f, 0.821841002f, 0.0956206322f, 0.340559244f, 0.710729361f, 0.294048309f, 0.550602019f, 0.5477404f, 0.459426761f, 0.330530643f, 0.448750198f, 0.723307252f, 0.945360661f, 0.541828394f, 0.515721142f, 0.401489377f, 0.115555525f, 0.31193316f, 0.421965003f, 0.34703815f, 0.511145055f, 0.841978669f, 0.468104243f, 0.444459438f, 0.0351740122f, 0.67506969f, 0.130610347f, 0.416100681f, 0.682723999f, 0.710575283f, 0.278804541f, 0.349085212f, 0.386647582f, 0.597998321f, 0.278149843f, 0.33548665f, 0.33452189f, 0.69053632f, 0.234269381f, 0.623361349f, 0.468785405f, 0.488186598f, 0.624023318f, 0.452339411f, 0.666957974f, 0.460383892f, 0.85853827f, 0.938921809f, 0.525213957f, 0.25166899f
};

FUNCTION_MODIFIER_INLINE void SelfTestSimple()
{
    float mse = 0.0f;
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i)
    {
        const float rgb3[3] = { inputTest[0][i], inputTest[1][i], inputTest[2][i] };
        const float lam1[1] = { inputTest[3][i] };

        float k1[KERNEL];
        float k2[KERNEL];

        RGBEncode(rgb3, k1);
        LambdaEncode(lam1, k2);
        const float pred = SpectralInteract(k1, k2);

        const float err = pred - gtTest[i];
        mse += err * err;

        std::printf("[test #%02d] pred=%.9f  gt=%.9f  err=%.9e\n", i, pred, gtTest[i], err);
    }
    mse /= 100.0f;    std::printf("[test] MSE=%.9e\n", mse);
}
}
